_meta: Team entity schema — Option B from discovery analysis (13 sampled teams, ~6691 total teams)

columns._meta: Fields are grouped by purpose. 'nullable' means the field is not present on all teams.

wiki_page_title.description: Original wiki page title — used as the unique key for upserts (e.g., 'Avengers_(Earth-616)')

image_url.description: Full CDN URL for the team's infobox image, resolved from wiki Image field via MediaWiki imageinfo API

aliases.description: Alternative names — comma-separated (e.g., 'Cap's Kooky Quartet, Earth's Mightiest Heroes')

origin.description: Brief founding narrative — 1-2 sentences (e.g., 'Formed to oppose Chinese government treatment of super-humans.')

creators.description: Comic creators — semicolon-separated (e.g., 'Fabian Nicieza; Mike Wieringo')

leaders.description: Current and former leaders — cleaned from wiki links, may include 'Formerly:' sections

current_members.description: Present active members — cleaned from wiki links, newline-separated

former_members.description: Past members — cleaned from wiki links, newline-separated. May reference external lists for large teams.

allies.description: Allied groups/individuals — cleaned from wiki links

enemies.description: Adversary entities — cleaned from wiki links

base_of_operations.description: Headquarters/locations — cleaned from wiki links (e.g., 'Mobile', 'Xavier's School for Gifted Youngsters')

place_of_formation.description: Where the team was founded — cleaned from wiki links

weapons.description: Team armaments — can be descriptive text or list

last_appearance.description: Last comic appearance — only for defunct teams

dropped_fields._meta: Fields from discovery that are intentionally excluded from the schema
dropped_fields.History: Multi-paragraph narrative — too large for structured DB (322K chars for X-Men alone). Origin field covers founding context.
dropped_fields.Overview: Brief overview text — redundant with Origin
dropped_fields.EditorialNames: Alternative publication title names — publication metadata, not entity data
dropped_fields.QuoteSource: Issue citation for quotation — redundant, the quote itself is sufficient
dropped_fields.Links: External reference links — not structured data
dropped_fields.NoGallery: Wiki display flag — not entity data
dropped_fields.Appendix: Link to appendix page — wiki navigation, not entity data

relationships._meta: These will be handled by join tables — defined separately after all entity schemas are finalized
relationships.character_teams: From CurrentMembers/FormerMembers/Leaders fields → join table with role (leader/member/former_member)
relationships.team_allies: From Allies/Enemies fields → join table linking teams to allied/enemy teams or characters
